section.heading: Cyber mission forces: program elements

subsection.heading: Budget Justification Display.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary of Defense shall submit to Congress, as a part of the defense budget materials for fiscal year 2021 and each fiscal year thereafter, a budget justification display, in electronic and print formats, that includes—

paragraph.content: a major force program category for the five-year defense plan of the Department of Defense for the training, manning, and equipping of the cyber mission forces and the cyberspace operations forces; and
program elements for the cyber mission forces and the cyberspace operations forces.

subsection.heading: Waiver.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary may waive the requirement under subsection (a) for fiscal year 2021 if the Secretary—

paragraph.content: determines the Secretary is unable to comply with such requirement for fiscal year 2021; and
establishes a plan to implement the requirement for fiscal year 2022.

subsection.heading: Submission.—
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary shall provide the displays described in subsection (a)—

paragraph.content: in electronic format not later than five days after the submission by the President under section 1105(a) of title 31 of the budget; and
in print format not later than 21 days after the submission by the President under section 1105(a) of title 31 of the budget.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 113–291, div. A, title XVI, § 1631(a)(1), Dec. 19, 2014, 128 Stat. 3637; amended Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title XVII, § 1701(2), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4080.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2021—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 116–283, § 1701(2)(A)(i), substituted “2021” for “2017” and inserted “, in electronic and print formats,” after “display” in introductory provisions.
Subsec. (a)(1). Pub. L. 116–283, § 1701(2)(A)(ii), inserted “and the cyberspace operations forces” before the semicolon.
Subsec. (a)(2). Pub. L. 116–283, § 1701(2)(A)(iii), inserted “and the cyberspace operations forces” before period at end.
Subsec. (b). Pub. L. 116–283, § 1701(2)(B)(i), substituted “2021” for “2017” in introductory provisions.

note.heading: Termination of Reporting Requirements
note.p: For termination, effective Dec. 31, 2021, of provisions of this section requiring submittal of annual report to Congress, see section 1061 of Pub. L. 114–328, set out as a note under section 111 of this title.

note.heading: Demonstration Program for Cyber and Information Technology Budget Data Analytics
